prose: **Most electrophilic Fukui reactivity of benzaldehyde (f⁺ index)** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact RKS integrals, no density fitting) in PySCF via chemkit, gas phase implicit (no solvent), charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz` used as-is (DFT single point on input geometry). SCF converged; integrity.trustworthy = true; no warnings reported. The most electrophilic atom is C3 (atom label 3) with f⁺ = 0.39938962. Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --stdout json --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpn0s9axe4/live.json`. Result JSON written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpn0s9axe4/live.json`.
